ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "dbn" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the school */,
  "district" INTEGER /* District number the school belongs to */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "building_id" TEXT /* Building identifier */,
  "total_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "grades_3k_pk_5_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in grades 3K-PK-5 */,
  "grades_6_8_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in grades 6-8 */,
  "grades_9_12_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in grades 9-12 */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email of the principal */,
  "principal_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the principal */,
  "address_street" TEXT /* Street address of the school */,
  "address_city" TEXT /* City of the school */,
  "address_state" TEXT /* State of the school */,
  "address_zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date the school was opened */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the school was closed */,
  "current_enrollment_status" TEXT /* Current enrollment status (open/closed) */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (elementary, middle, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dbn")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "dbn" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the school */,
  "%_asian" REAL /* Percentage of students identified as Asian */,
  "%_black" REAL /* Percentage of students identified as Black */,
  "%_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of students identified as Hispanic */,
  "%_multiple_race_categories_not_represented" REAL /* Percentage of students with multiple race categories not represented */,
  "%_white" REAL /* Percentage of students identified as White */,
  "%_swd" REAL /* Percentage of students with disabilities (SWD) */,
  "%_ell" REAL /* Percentage of English language learners (ELL) */,
  "%_poverty" REAL /* Percentage of students living in poverty */,
  "%_male" REAL /* Percentage of male students */,
  "%_female" REAL /* Percentage of female students */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of students */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of students */,
  "%_free_or_reduced_lunch" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving free or reduced-price lunch */,
  "average_parental_education_level" TEXT /* Average educational level of parents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dbn")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_locations" (
  "dbn" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the school */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code identifying the location of the school */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (school) */,
  "geographical_district_code" INTEGER /* Code for the geographical district */,
  "borough_code" TEXT /* Borough of the school */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the school's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the school's location */,
  "address_street" TEXT /* Street address of the school */,
  "address_city" TEXT /* City of the school */,
  "address_state" TEXT /* State of the school */,
  "address_zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  "is_accessible" TEXT /* Indicates if the school is accessible to students with disabilities */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood or community the school is located in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dbn")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_management" (
  "dbn" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the school */,
  "managed_by_name" TEXT /* Name of the managing entity (e.g., DOE) */,
  "location_category_description" TEXT /* Description of the school's category (e.g., Elementary, K-8) */,
  "grades_text" TEXT /* Text representation of the grades offered by the school */,
  "managed_by_email" TEXT /* Email of the managing entity */,
  "managed_by_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the managing entity */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Primary funding source for the school */,
  "programs_and_interventions" TEXT /* List of educational programs and interventions available at the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dbn")
)
column_names: District number the school belongs to
Number of students enrolled in grades 3K-PK-5
Number of students enrolled in grades 6-8
Number of students enrolled in grades 9-12
Percentage of students identified as Asian
Percentage of students identified as Black
Percentage of students identified as Hispanic
Percentage of students with multiple race categories not represented
Percentage of students identified as White
Percentage of students living in poverty
Percentage of students receiving free or reduced-price lunch
Code identifying the location of the school
Indicates if the school is accessible to students with disabilities
Neighborhood or community the school is located in
Name of the managing entity (e.g., DOE)
Description of the school's category (e.g., Elementary, K-8)
Text representation of the grades offered by the school
Phone number of the managing entity
Primary funding source for the school
List of educational programs and interventions available at the school
